method: REAL ChurnBench U=2 data (10 principals, n_facts=5, distractor_sessions=4, seed=1) — cosine(raw slice, nearest superseded fact of the same attribute), labeled by exact substring match against churnbench_data.py pools (ground truth).
rationale: 100% stale-echo recall, 7% false-positive rate on legitimately-current raw echoes (the FP cost is low: the distilled CURRENT fact is unaffected either way; only a supplementary raw duplicate is dropped). Dominates 0.60 (81% FPR) and 0.80 (only 20.9% recall, matching the original _STALE_ECHO failure this component fixes).
